languages.text: "Вы считаете, что планета в прямом смысле живая, почтенный генетор?"
"Are you suggesting that the planet is quite literally a living being, esteemed Genetor?"

languages.text: «¿Sugiere que el planeta es literalmente un ser vivo, estimado genetor?».

languages.text: “你的意思是，这颗行星本身就是一个活生生的生命体，尊敬的基因士？”

languages.text: "Wollt Ihr damit andeuten, der Planet ist buchstäblich ein lebendes Wesen, geschätzter Genetor?"
languages.original_text: "Are you suggesting that the planet is quite literally a living being, esteemed Genetor?"

languages.text: « Selon vous, cette planète serait en réalité un être vivant, honorable genetor ? »
languages.original_text: "Are you suggesting that the planet is quite literally a living being, esteemed Genetor?"

traits.locale_text: « Selon vous, cette planète serait en réalité un être vivant, honorable genetor ? »

languages.text: "Gezegenin kelimenin tam anlamıyla canlı bir varlık olduğunu mu öne sürüyorsunuz saygıdeğer Genetör?"
languages.original_text: "Are you suggesting that the planet is quite literally a living being, esteemed Genetor?"

traits.locale_text: "Gezegenin kelimenin tam anlamıyla canlı bir varlık olduğunu mu öne sürüyorsunuz saygıdeğer Genetör?"

languages.text: 「この惑星は、まさに生きた存在であると、あなたは言いたいのですか、尊敬するジェネトル」
